questions.question: How many ways to arrange letters in BANANA?
questions.answer:
BANANA has 6 letters: A(3), N(2), B(1)
Using permutation with repetition:
= 6! / (3! × 2! × 1!)
= 720 / (6 × 2 × 1)
= 720 / 12
= 60 ways

questions.question: A committee of 4 is to be formed from 6 men and 4 women with at least 2 women. How many ways?
